source: user-agent feedback on product/system knowledge-base organization

decisions.summary: Keep the knowledge base organized around product and system towers.
Represent product users, stories, and UIs as folders rather than single aggregate files.
Rename product surfaces to product UIs because these docs describe user-facing interaction experiences.
Move technical client/distribution concerns under system clients.
Do not require every folder to contain an overview document; add index/overview documents only when they improve navigation or ownership clarity.

target_structure..codewiki/kb/product/stories/**: product jobs, outcomes, and acceptance signals
target_structure..codewiki/kb/system/clients/**: technical distribution clients, adapters, packages, and integrations

validation_expectations.vertical: accepted layout decision is represented in product/system docs and links
validation_expectations.horizontal: product UIs do not duplicate system client implementation details; system clients do not restate product UX goals except as constraints
